pi_items.source: task.json instructions and export_result.sh target path
setup_task.sh limits the extracted FITS sequence to 'head -n 30' frames
task.json specifies exactly 10 frames per second for the exported AVI
install_astroimagej.sh downloads WASP-12b data from www.astro.louisville.edu

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real observational dataset (WASP-12b Calibrated Images) downloaded directly from the University of Louisville. The setup script extracts exactly 30 FITS files to form the target image sequence. The evaluation checks for an output AVI file strictly located at /home/ga/AstroImages/tracking_video.avi, and the agent must set the export frame rate to 10.0 FPS per the task instructions.
